entities.name: CGIAR
entities.description: A global partnership of organizations engaged in research for a food-secure future

entities.name: PLANT TREATY
entities.description: The International Treaty on Plant Genetic Resources for Food and Agriculture

entities.name: GOVERNING BODY
entities.description: The administrative body of the Plant Treaty

entities.name: ARTICLE 15
entities.description: A specific section of the Plant Treaty governing access and benefit sharing

entities.name: CROP GERMPLASM
entities.description: Genetic material from crops, trees, and forage used for breeding

entities.name: CGIAR GENEBANKS
entities.description: Facilities managed by CGIAR for the conservation of plant genetic resources

entities.name: MULTILATERAL SYSTEM OF ACCESS AND BENEFIT SHARING
entities.description: A system for the exchange of plant genetic resources and the sharing of benefits

entities.name: PLANT GENETIC RESOURCES
entities.description: Genetic material of plant origin of actual or potential value for food and agriculture

entities.name: CROP ENHANCEMENT
entities.description: Activities aimed at improving crop characteristics

entities.name: IMPROVED AGRONOMIC METHODS
entities.description: Advanced techniques for crop cultivation and management

entities.name: SEED SYSTEM STRENGTHENING
entities.description: Processes to improve the delivery and quality of seeds to farmers

entities.name: CAPACITY BUILDING
entities.description: The process of developing and strengthening skills and instincts

entities.name: MONETARY BENEFIT SHARING
entities.description: The distribution of financial gains derived from the use of genetic resources

entities.name: NONMONETARY BENEFIT SHARING
entities.description: The distribution of non-financial benefits such as technology and knowledge

entities.name: PARTNERSHIPS
entities.description: Collaborative agreements between organizations or countries

entities.name: TECHNOLOGY TRANSFER
entities.description: The movement of data, designs, inventions, and skills between organizations

entities.name: INFORMATION EXCHANGE
entities.description: The sharing of data and knowledge between parties

entities.name: CONSERVATION
entities.description: The preservation and protection of plant genetic resources

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE USE
entities.description: The use of resources in a way that does not deplete them for future generations

entities.name: FARMERS' RIGHTS
entities.description: The rights of farmers to save, use, exchange and sell farm-saved seeds
